channel.title: GitHub ShaderLab Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of ShaderLab in GitHub

item.title: ColinLeung-NiloCat/UnityURPToonLitShaderExample
item.description: A very simple toon lit shader example, for you to learn writing custom lit shader in Unity URP

item.title: candycat1992/Unity_Shaders_Book
item.description: 📖 书籍《Unity Shader入门精要》源代码

item.title: poiyomi/PoiyomiToonShader
item.description: A feature rich toon shader for unity and VR Chat

item.title: soupday/cc_unity_tools_URP
item.description: Package for importing and auto setup of Character Creator (3 & 4) and iClone (7 & 8) character exports for Unity URP Pipeline.
